description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Pamplejuce that runs on workflow dispatch and push events. The workflow should have a concurrency policy to cancel in-progress jobs on the same branch. Set up a matrix build with Linux, macOS, and Windows environments, and perform a series of steps including setting up Clang, installing dependencies, checking out code, configuring and building the project, running tests and pluginval, codesigning, and creating artifacts.
